source.note: wasm-eth candidates; cases ordered by execution_frequency. stats.after and powdr_opt_stats are counted from the committed .powdr_opt.json.gz files, which are is_valid-guard stripped, so stats.after reflects the stripped file (== powdr_opt_stats plus main_columns) rather than a guard-included count.
source.powdr_opt_stage: after optimize(), before add_guards (is_valid guards stripped)
